name: mpp-api
description: Paid AI API with machine payments (MPP + Tempo)

agentContext.summary: A paid AI API using the Machine Payments Protocol (MPP). Agents pay per request with Tempo stablecoins — no accounts, no billing pages. Built on Hono with Cloudflare Workers AI.
agentContext.full_text:
## Project Structure

- `src/index.ts` - Hono API with MPP payment-gated AI endpoint
- `src/jack-ai.ts` - Jack AI proxy wrapper (do not modify)
- `wrangler.jsonc` - Cloudflare Workers configuration

## How It Works

This API uses HTTP 402 (Payment Required) to gate access to AI endpoints. When an agent calls `/v1/chat/completions` without payment credentials, the server returns a 402 with payment instructions. The agent pays via the MPP protocol (Tempo stablecoins), then retries with proof of payment.

### Payment Flow

1. Agent sends `POST /v1/chat/completions` with messages
2. Server returns HTTP 402 with `WWW-Authenticate` header containing payment details
3. Agent authorizes payment (Tempo pathUSD stablecoin)
4. Agent retries with `Authorization` header containing payment proof
5. Server verifies payment, runs AI inference, returns response with `Payment-Receipt` header

## API Endpoints

- `GET /` - Service info and pricing (free)
- `GET /health` - Health check (free)
- `POST /v1/chat/completions` - AI chat completion ($0.01 per request, paid via MPP)

### Chat Request
```json
{
  "messages": [
    { "role": "user", "content": "What is the capital of France?" }
  ],
  "model": "@cf/meta/llama-3.3-70b-instruct-fp8-fast"
}
```

## Testing with mppx CLI

```bash
npm i -g mppx
mppx account create
mppx POST https://your-app.runjack.xyz/v1/chat/completions -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hello"}]}'
```

## Environment Variables

- `TEMPO_RECIPIENT` - Your Tempo wallet address for receiving payments

## Pricing

Edit the `amount` in `mppx.charge({ amount: '0.01' })` to change per-request pricing.

## Resources

- [MPP Protocol](https://mpp.dev)
- [mppx SDK](https://github.com/wevm/mppx)
- [Tempo Network](https://tempo.xyz)
- [Workers AI Models](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers-ai/models)
